checks.name: dark-mode browser proof
checks.reason: With emulated Dark Mode, route #charters reported metaColorScheme=light, documentColorScheme=light, proof select/input/checkbox colorScheme=light, warm-paper body colors, and no console errors

notes: Browser plugin fallback: iab endpoint was unavailable, so Codex used the existing admin Playwright package via NODE_PATH.
The web preview cannot read the local charter store, so Codex injected native proof controls into the actual #charters document to verify UA control color-scheme under emulated Dark Mode.
